name: Alex Chen
summary: Backend Java developer with 3 years building RESTful microservices for e-commerce platforms. Comfortable with Spring Boot and relational databases. Looking to move into fintech where performance and correctness matter.

experience.title: Junior → Mid Java Developer
bullets: Built and maintained 4 Spring Boot microservices handling 50k daily orders
Reduced API response time by 40% by adding Redis caching layer
Introduced integration testing with Testcontainers, raising coverage from 45% to 78%
Participated in on-call rotation, resolving 3-4 production incidents per month
